title: How Claude Code's Creator ACTUALLY Automates his work
summary: Austin Marchese breaks down how Boris Cherny, creator of Claude Code, uses Claude Skills for automation. The video reverse-engineers Cherny's system to identify the test for converting work into skills and three amplification strategies: agents, hooks, and loops/scheduling.
